DATA_DIR.description: Base directory used by all templates for persistent data. Change applies to new deployments.

LLDAP_HOST.description: LLDAP hostname (localhost if running on same node)

LAN_IP.description: Host LAN IP. Auto-detected and filled in by ServiceBay at install time (#817) — leave blank; the installer overrides it. Used by isolated-network templates for a hostAliases entry that points the public auth subdomain at the LAN.

notes: Add additional template variables here. They will be offered in the UI and applied only to new deployments.
